items.claim: Conor McGregor has been inactive for approximately five years.
items.quote: He's been off for basically five years.

items.claim: Conor McGregor suffered a broken leg in his last fight.
items.quote: he left on a broken leg.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has not won a fight in nearly seven years.
items.quote: before that, he hadn't won since basically six and a half, almost seven years ago.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is in his late 30s.
items.quote: We're getting a McGregor here that is in his late 30s

items.claim: The current media landscape is too saturated for McGregor's return to generate the same level of pop culture impact as his previous fights.
items.quote: Now there's so much content being generated that that gets forgotten pretty quick and you really have to make a big uh statement in order to step into a you know this pop culture right and I feel like McGregor has yet to do that.
